S.FORM: Gregg Arnold cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

S.PHON: ɣreɣɣ arnol* ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
